title: execution governance and deterministic renderer census

knownLocalTimeout.processCleanup: stopped the timed-out vitest process tree before continuing
knownLocalTimeout.followUp: remote CI remains the full-suite gate; next writes must first check the pushed run conclusion

ciPolicy.redRun: blocks all new writes until repaired
